description:
What: When callee spec is Dst(k), caller emits alloc(k) from Cheney (RC arena lands later in B-arc), passes dst as extra arg, cont receives dst. Both Call and CallClosure terminators.

Why: Owns destination lifetime at the caller frame.

CLIF impact: adds call alloc_X + dst arg threading. For 'alloc-and-return' callees: the alloc just moves from callee to caller — net same.

Removes: callee's now-redundant return-value materialization.

Tests: golden CLIF parity across one Call and one CallClosure site.

comments.text: subsumed by fz-q9g.3 (CD-bundle): wire ABI cannot land without a constructor demonstrating it

title: fz-dps.C3: lower Term::Call/CallClosure under Dst ABI
